## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that GreenCap doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, links, or anything else that helps.
